items.title: [SteamśĖįťóĽ] V2.5.0.0 Maintenance Announcement
items.summary: Dear Keeper, The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on April 20 from 08:00~12:00. After this maintenance, the old version client will no longer be available. Keepers need to visit the official website or app store to install the latest version package in order to continue logging in. (After maintenance begins,keepers may choose to update in the app store, or follow the prompts from the old version client to perform the update.) Wishing everyone a successful inv...
items.author: Mythag Staff

items.title: [SteamśĖįťóĽ] V2.5.0 About Arachne: Perpetual Thrall
items.summary: Who will be buried beneath a foreign sky?Who in the soil of home shall forever lie?Fate hands down its familiar verdict:A white-on-black obituary, nothing more.Prescience illuminates the end,But leaves the grey and murky road unlit.Shall we choose oblivion now,Or devastation at the end?The Master of Fate is its servant too...A prisoner bound within her self-made web.No time to weep, no time to laugh‚ÄĒStill her hands turn the spindle, never to rest."Within this cage of fate, we come with naught‚ÄĒan...
items.author: lqx02483534
